destinations.evidence: The v2 port represents the 0x0820 agent precompile as PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE and decodes its delivery callback fields from ABI head fields 6-11, not the long-running HTTP field-8 layout.
The request codec validates and decodes the current 0x0820 agent ABI rather than reusing LongRunningHTTPCallRequest.

equivalence_argument: Mapped under the current port naming: the invariant's autonomous-agent 0x0820 behavior corresponds to PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE locally, and Phase 2 settlement creation uses the 0x0820 agent ABI delivery field offset 6 instead of the long-running HTTP offset 8.
notes: Mapped; local code names the 0x0820 surface Persistent Agent, but the delivery-config offset matches the invariant behavior.
rationale: The payload builder detects the autonomous agent precompile and calls DeliveryConfig::from_autonomous_agent_abi, with the commit body documenting autonomous-agent delivery config extraction. This result keeps the candidate as a distinct refined invariant because the bounded assignment packet does not contain a newer candidate that clearly supersedes it. Implementation-detail caveat: DeliveryConfig parsing is an ABI boundary detail, and the specific consumer callback contract may evolve.
statement: Phase 2 settlement creation for Autonomous Agent decodes DeliveryConfig from the autonomous agent input format, where delivery configuration begins at fields 6-11, rather than using the default long-running HTTP delivery layout.
suggested_falsification_tests: Encode an AutonomousAgentRequest with a distinctive delivery target, selector, gas limit, fee fields, and value at fields 6-11. Assert create_delivery_settlement_transaction decodes exactly those values and fails when the autonomous-agent delivery config section is malformed.
summary: 0x0820 agent delivery config is decoded from ABI fields 6-11 in the port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Encode a 0x0820 Persistent/Autonomous Agent request with delivery fields at 6-11 and assert prepare_delivery_settlement_transaction uses those callback values; moving them to long-running HTTP fields should fail or decode different values.
title: Autonomous Agent delivery config decodes from its ABI
